title: Clementoni Jigsaw Puzzle Space Mission 300 Pieces - Supercolor Puzzle For Children 9-11 Years, Cartoon, Gift For Boy/Girls, Planets, Stars, Puzzle For Kids, Made In Italy, 21724
features: Size of completed jigsaw puzzle: 48,5 x 33,5 cm
Ever seen a magical jigsaw that you can tinge with colour just by using water as often as you like? It’s Water Magic Puzzle!

Piece the jigsaw together and have fun colouring it with a felt tip to be dipped into water. The drawing will come to life, taking on myriad different shades and then the colours will vanish again, as if by magic.
With this jigsaw, children will enjoy hours of fun as each brush stroke leaves them astounded and amazed!
description: From the manufacturer Clementoni has stood for creativity, passion and quality for over 60 years. Mario Clementoni founded the company with a belief that we have passed on since then and that inspires children and adults around the world - the belief in the power of play: "Every child devotes all the attention and concentration they are capable of to the moment of play, and remembers well the things they do with joy. And what it does with great joy is to play". jigsaw puzzles for kids Discover the diverse and colourful world of puzzles Part by part, the puzzle experience is assembled and lets your child immerse yourself in the worlds of their favourite characters. Specially designed for children, promote memory, concentration, thinking and manual skills. The captivating images of the cartoon stars, animals, princesses and dinosaurs in bright colours bring many exciting puzzle adventures into the children's room and give together play hours with friends and family. creative puzzle collections Thinking fun for children from 2 years Different difficulty levels Large selection of designs Made in Italy jewels puzzle Sparkling rhinestones make this colourful, classic puzzle a very special gem. The magical highlights that decorate the finished puzzle provide fun, enthusiasm and bright children's eyes. 104 + 3D model The absolute favourite characters, such as Lightning McQueen, are waiting to be brought to life in 104 pieces. The puzzles in 3D card format provide amazement and exciting playing hours. Ready to puzzle together? meter puzzle When assembled, the meter puzzles transform into a measuring bar for the wall. Perfect for capturing your child's growth creatively with photos, data and markings. This makes growing up fun with your favourite heroes Frame Me Up Without glue, your favourite puzzle can be easily hung on the wall thanks to a special cardboard frame. So your favourite hero or princess beautifies the children's room and your little ones can proudly present their puzzle talent. My First Puzzle The first puzzle for the little ones is perfect for small children's hands with the shaped, solid and extra large puzzle pieces. Different difficulty levels make your child become a puzzle hero early on. Happy Colour Double Face Double colourful puzzle fun with two sides for an extra creative experience! After puzzling, the motif is created on the back as a colouring picture.
